execution_blockers.blocker: Jest Subject-based async tests timed out — lastValueFrom() never resolved because Subject Observable does not complete
execution_blockers.resolution: Replaced Subject mocks with of(action) in dialog service mock — simpler and correct for unit tests

key_decisions: Added saveForNavigation() to SaveMiddleware instead of calling saveOrder() (void) or duplicating logic in guard
Used switchMap in guard to map dialog actions to Observable<boolean>
Placed <lib-unsaved-changes-dialog /> outside all @if blocks in OrdersFeatComponent template
Used of(action) in test mocks instead of Subject to avoid lastValueFrom timeout
